name: River
descr: Perennial river or major stream — continuous flow year-round; high scour potential

name: Creek / Stream
descr: Seasonal or intermittent watercourse — flash flood scour risk

name: Tidal / Estuarine
descr: Tidal waterway — bi-directional flow; salt corrosion and scour (AP-G71.8 §3.2)

name: Drainage Channel / Drain
descr: Constructed or improved stormwater channel — typically concrete-lined

name: Flood Plain Crossing
descr: Bridge on embankment across flood plain — wide flow path during flood events

name: Lake / Reservoir
descr: Crossing of still water body — minimal scour; wave action consideration

name: Dry Gully / Ephemeral
descr: Normally dry watercourse — rainfall-triggered flash flooding only

name: Overpass / Road-over-Road
descr: No waterway — spanning road,  rail,  or infrastructure corridor
